raw_consumer_statement:
I have had an American Express Card for a number of years. I've used it only for XXXX air travel which I've largely stopped since XXXX. My wife usually pays our bills and I found out a few months ago she's been paying a {$7.00} monthly fee. I thought the card was charge free and called, the charge was a monthly bill from XXXX. However I have no XXXX service. 
I called American Express, they indicated they couldn't help that I needed to take it up with XXXX I called XXXX but they had no record of me having a service contract with them and said they couldn't help. I cancelled my American Express last month. 
Now I ' m getting bills from American Express for XXXX charges AND a late fee. When I live chatted with American Express just know they said I needed to take it up with XXXX. 
Why should I pay for services I don't receive and late fees on top of it??? 

I've had a few false charges on my XXXX XXXX but never had problems getting them sorted out.
